items.title: Noskova holds her nerve to beat Muchova for first Wimbledon title
items.summary: Linda Noskova overcomes missing out on five Championship points in the second set, to defeat Karolina Muchova 6-2 5-7 6-3 to win her first Wimbledon title at 21 years old.
